productDisplayName: Nike Men Black Celso Solarsoft Thong Flip Flops
description: Style Note One look at these flip flops and your feet are bound to sigh with the pleasure of relaxation. The nike Chelso Solarsoft thongs are designed keeping in mind absolute cushioned comfort to relax your feet and offer a comfortable ride. It’s so flexible that you can squeeze with all your might and it still bounces back to shape.  Product Details Grooved and soft TU footbed with rubber and fabric thong straps  Print on the footbed Rubber outsole with deep flex grooves, upraised at the heel Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
